title: Set individual logo for workspace
excerpt:
Hi everyone😊, 
I am new to monday and I would like to know how I can set an individual logo for a workspace (in my case the main workspace). In the online documentation I could find there only was options for choosing so…

posts.author: mihuba (Michael )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone😊,

I am new to monday and I would like to know how I can set an individual logo for a workspace (in my case the main workspace). In the online documentation I could find there only was options for choosing some of those preset icons and its color. Is it possible to upload your own file somehow?

Looking forward to hearing from you,
Michael

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @mihuba

Welcome to the community! You can set the color and logo in the workspace settings, see below.

image839×607 66.8 KB

posts.author: mihuba (Michael )
posts.cookedHtml: thank you so much! I simply didn’t see the “upload your own” option. problem solved😊.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mihuba

It look like this post Set individual logo for workspace - #2 by basdebruin might have answered your question, is that correct?

If so, please don’t forget to mark it as the solution so other users can easily find it, and to close this thread
If not, feel free to ask any additional questions you have!

Best,
Dani

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
